title: Minecraft Revamped
description: Minecraft Revamped is a new modpack created by v0ltzZy for Minecraft 1.21.4. All mods that alter the game have been stripped away in favour of mostly client-side only mods (with a few exceptions).
body:
**A REVAMPED VANILLA MINECRAFT EXPERIENCE**
Every single mod and resource pack in this mod pack is aimed to polish the Minecraft experience, enhancing everything from the UI, QOL, sounds, building, structures, and plenty more.

**PERFORMANCE**
Countless mods improve performance in almost every way possible from world generation and entity culling to memory usage and even the rendering of text in game.

**POLISHED UI**
Plenty of mods enhance the UI, adding animations to opening and closing the inventory, moving items, smoothly scrolling inventories and plenty more.

**DETAILS**
**3D crops, ladders, doors, vines, glow lichen, rails, lanterns and chains** all for some added depth.
**Spring Flowers & More Grass Heights** add several variations to each flower and height variation to tall and short grass.

**YOUTUBE LINK BELOW**
[YOUTUBE CHANNEL](https://www.youtube.com/@v0ltzZy)
